summary.zh: 合成咨询方案样例已具备 source、Web Deck、封面截图和交付检查清单；重点证明问题定义、选项比较和路线图结构可复用。
summary.en: Synthetic consulting proposal proof includes source, Web Deck, cover screenshot, and delivery checklist.

checks.summary: Source brief includes decision context, evidence, options, and roadmap inputs.
Starter proof keeps client-facing structure visible without private data.
Preset declares expected artifacts, review commands, and acceptance criteria.
